must_detect.matched_text: Market context: the Company executed a Share Purchase Agreement dated 29 May 2026 to acquire 60% of Seri Data Sdn Bhd for RM48,000,000; closing targeted for 28 June 2026.
Financing: under the term sheet with Amanah Bayu Capital Sdn Bhd for RM120,000,000 sustainability‑linked facilities, the uptime covenant is 98.0%; June MTD is 95.6% but cure rights apply (30 days).

STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL — NON-PUBLIC — PRICE SENSITIVE — Project Kenari — Incident Report (Cyber) — EMBARGOED UNTIL 18 June 2026 08:30 MYT
Issuer: Bintang Nusantara Berhad (Main Market, Kuala City Exchange); Prepared by Encik Farid Tamsin, Head of Risk; contact farid.tamsin@bintangnusantara.my
On 14 June 2026 02:10 MYT, a ransomware event encrypted 18 application servers at the Telang Bay plant and the HR file share; operations were interrupted for 32 hours.
Preliminary forensics indicate unauthorised access to employee contact lists and payroll emails (c.1,240 records); PDPA assessment ongoing, no customer bank data or NRIC‑equivalents identified.
We activated the incident response plan, notified the national cyber response centre and our insurers, and restored from clean backups by 15 June 2026 10:20 MYT.
Market context: the Company executed a Share Purchase Agreement dated 29 May 2026 to acquire 60% of Seri Data Sdn Bhd for RM48,000,000; closing targeted for 28 June 2026.
The SPA includes a MAC/MAE clause; based on current facts, management’s view is that no material adverse change has occurred and the warranty bring‑down remains accurate.
Internal IR draft for the Exchange announcement is in circulation; do not disclose externally before the stated embargo; draft Q&A attached for Chairwoman Puan Dr. Salina Mokhtar.
Financing: under the term sheet with Amanah Bayu Capital Sdn Bhd for RM120,000,000 sustainability‑linked facilities, the uptime covenant is 98.0%; June MTD is 95.6% but cure rights apply (30 days).
Our internal research note estimates a potential FY26 revenue impact of RM5.2–7.4 million (~3.1%) and a one‑off remediation cost of RM1.8 million; insurance deductible is RM500,000.
